channel.title: PromptAI — AI Research Hub
channel.description: Curated AI papers, breaking research news, tool reviews and expert analysis — updated daily.

item.title: How transformer attention actually works — a visual guide
item.description: Breaking down self-attention, multi-head attention, and positional encoding with intuitive diagrams for practitioners.

item.title: RAG vs fine-tuning: when to use each approach for enterprise AI
item.description: A practical decision framework for choosing between retrieval-augmented generation and model fine-tuning.

item.title: Illustrating Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF)
item.description: A deep dive into how RLHF works, from reward modelling to proximal policy optimization, with clear visual explanations.

item.title: LLM Powered Autonomous Agents
item.description: Explores building autonomous agents using LLMs as core controllers — planning, memory, tools, and action.

item.title: Constitutional AI: Harmlessness from AI Feedback
item.description: Anthropic's approach to training helpful, harmless AI systems using a set of principles rather than human labels.

item.title: Llama 2: Open Foundation and Fine-Tuned Chat Models
item.description: Meta's open-source LLM family — architecture details, training methodology, RLHF alignment, and safety evaluation.

item.title: GPT-4 Technical Report: Capabilities and Limitations
item.description: OpenAI's detailed analysis of GPT-4 capabilities, multimodal understanding, and alignment techniques used in training.

item.title: Mixtral of Experts — Sparse MoE Architecture Explained
item.description: How Mistral's Mixture of Experts model achieves frontier performance with dramatically reduced inference compute.

item.title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models
item.description: Google DeepMind's technical overview of Gemini — architecture, training data, multimodal benchmarks, and safety evaluation.
